scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n web,desktop -c green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/contracts && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/desktop
